data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for capturing delay reasons such as weather, material shortages, and permit issues. While the linked use case mentions a delay due to waiting for a concrete truck, it does not explicitly categorize this delay under the required reasons, nor does it provide a comprehensive mechanism for capturing various delay reasons. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement as it lacks the necessary detail and structure to confirm full compliance.
gaps: No explicit capture of delay reasons (weather, material shortage, permit issues) in the reporting structure.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define delay reasons capture mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure the API captures and categorizes delay reasons accurately.
